name: Renamer
summary: Bulk-renames Cove library items from configurable metadata templates, updating the file on disk and its Cove database record together, with preview and undo.

versions.changelog: Settings now render as a full page using Cove's page-layout settings tab — the extension owns the whole tab canvas instead of the host's card chrome. Requires Cove 1.0.0.
First published release: template-based bulk renaming of videos and images with preview, rename, and undo over the extension API.
